faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal services in Bethpage typically range from $350 to $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests or easily accessible areas fall on the lower end, while high nests in eaves, attics, or wall voids may cost more. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Bethpage, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Bethpage properties commonly deal with yellow jackets, paper wasps, bald-faced hornets, and European hornets. Yellow jackets often build ground nests in lawns and gardens, while paper wasps prefer eaves and overhangs. Our technicians are experienced with all local wasp species and adapt removal strategies to ensure complete elimination based on the specific type infesting your property.
